title: content/units/unit-NN/readings.json — supplemental readings (Tectonic LaTeX PDFs and external resources)

id.description: Globally unique. rd_<unitNumber>_<slug>; the prefix must match this file's unitNumber (validator-enforced).

kind.description: Drives placement in the UI: cheat-sheet fills the unit's primary download and the Cheat Sheets index card; topic-guide entries build the Topic guides sublist; reference-guide anchors the unit detail readings row; everything else lists after it.

title.description: UI copy — strict copy rule (no em dashes, no ampersands).

description.description: Optional one-line UI subtitle. Strict copy rule.

file.description: Bare filename resolved under ode/assets/pdfs/ (document-relative, file:// legal). Exactly one of file or url unless status is planned (validator-enforced). Must exist on disk when the entry is not planned.

url.description: Absolute-URL escape hatch for readings too large to commit (e.g. R2-hosted PDFs). https only.

status.description: planned marks a scaffolded target whose PDF has not been rendered yet: the web compiler drops its file/url so the UI shows a text label, never a dead link.
